products.name: Height Adjustable Desk
products.shortDescription: Electric height-adjustable standing desk with dual-motor system, memory presets, and premium build quality.
products.fullDescription: Our flagship height adjustable desk features a precision dual-motor lifting system that smoothly transitions between sitting and standing positions. The robust steel frame supports up to 150kg while maintaining whisper-quiet operation under 50dB. Memory presets allow users to save their preferred heights, and the anti-collision system ensures safety in busy office environments.

specifications.Desktop Material: E1 grade MFC / Solid wood option

products.seoTitle: Height Adjustable Desk | Electric Standing Desk Manufacturer
products.seoDescription: Premium electric height adjustable desk with dual-motor system. Wholesale MOQ 20 units. ISO9001 certified manufacturer exporting to 50+ countries.

products.name: Executive Office Desk

products.fullDescription: Designed for modern executives, this office desk combines elegant aesthetics with practical functionality. The integrated cable management system keeps workspaces tidy, while modular storage options adapt to evolving needs. Available in multiple finishes to complement any office interior.

products.name: Ergonomic Office Chair
products.shortDescription: Fully adjustable ergonomic chair with lumbar support, breathable mesh, and synchronized tilt mechanism.
products.fullDescription: Engineered for all-day comfort, our ergonomic office chair features a dynamic lumbar support system that adapts to individual spine curvature. The breathable mesh back promotes airflow while the synchronized tilt mechanism ensures proper posture through every recline angle.

products.seoDescription: Fully adjustable ergonomic office chair with lumbar support and 4D armrests. BIFMA certified. Wholesale from manufacturer. MOQ 50 units.

products.name: Steel Filing Cabinet
products.shortDescription: Heavy-duty steel filing cabinet with smooth drawer slides, lockable drawers, and anti-tilt mechanism.
products.fullDescription: Built for secure document storage, our steel filing cabinet features precision ball-bearing drawer slides for effortless operation. Each drawer is individually lockable, and the anti-tilt mechanism prevents multiple drawers from opening simultaneously for enhanced safety.
products.seoTitle: Steel Filing Cabinet | Lockable Storage Cabinet Manufacturer
products.seoDescription: Heavy-duty steel filing cabinet with lockable drawers and anti-tilt mechanism. ISO9001 certified manufacturer. MOQ 30 units.

products.name: Conference Table
products.shortDescription: Modular conference table system with integrated power, cable management, and scalable configurations.
products.fullDescription: Our conference table system adapts to any meeting space from 6-person huddles to 20-person boardrooms. Modular sections connect seamlessly with integrated power and data modules. The cable management spine runs the full length, keeping technology connections organized and accessible.
